name: signed-checkpoint contains the merkle root over the included audit log entries
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && printf '{"event":"e1"}\n' > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/checkpoint.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --checkpoint-dir compliance/audit-checkpoints --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"merkle_root"' compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json && echo ok 1>&2
